basicInfo.name: Nightmare Sun Wukong
basicInfo.flavor: After being sealed and imprisoned within the Marble Mountains for his many misdeeds, Sun Wukong was eventually set free by the monk Sanzang. Afterward, he joined Sanzang's journey, earning recognition for his feats and exploits and became known as the Victorious Fighting Buddha.

Normal Attack.desc:
Single Enemy
 - Deals damage equal to 130% of Magic Attack 1 time(s).
 - 100% chance to inflict Petrify. [Duration: 10 Turn(s)]
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Increases Damage: To 130% of Physical Attack.

Skill 1.name: Jumbo Pole
Skill 1.desc:
All Enemies
 - Deals damage equal to 40% of Magic Attack 3 time(s).
 - 100% chance to inflict Petrify. [Duration: 10 Turn(s)]
 - Deals additional damage equal to 2000% of Magic Attack against targets inflicted with [Petrify].
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Increases Damage: To 40% of Physical Attack.

Skill 2.name: Clone Beatdown
Skill 2.desc:
All Enemies
 - Deals Piercing damage equal to 40% of Magic Attack 3 time(s).
 - 100% chance to inflict Petrify. [Duration: 10 Turn(s)]
 - Deals additional damage equal to 2500% of Magic Attack against targets inflicted with [Petrify].
 - All Allies
 - Heals HP equal to 20% of the caster's Max HP.
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Increases Damage: To 40% of Physical Attack.

Passive.name: Final Clone
Passive.desc:
Self
 - Grants Guts. [Once per Battle]
 - Grants a Barrier equal to 1000% of the caster's Magic Attack upon triggering Guts. [Duration: 10 Turn(s)]
 - Reduces skill cooldowns by 10s upon being hit by an enemy's attack.
 - Revives with 100% HP upon falling in battle. [Once per Battle]

profile.story:
Sun Wukong is a yokai born from the rocks of Flower-Fruit Mountain in the Celestial Realm.
It was some one hundred fifty years ago when he first began to understand the concept of aging and years passing, and so he believes himself to be around that age.
But in reality, he is one of the oldest and greatest yokai in existence.
Harboring a deep distaste for oppression and domination since the days of Ragnarok, he's waged countless fierce battles against demonkind.
While he achieved great merit for his accomplishments on the battlefield, his poor relationship with the high-handed valkyries caused him to constantly butt heads and raise issues in the Celestial Realm.
Now, he wears the Golden Circlet on his temples and lives on Earth and is tasked with keeping watch over the sealed yokai in Sage Peak. 
The Golden Circlet inflicts Sun Wukong with excruciating pain whenever he tries to wield the true extent of his powers and serves to keep his aggressive instincts in check during his daily life — so now, he obediently follows the commands of the Celestial Realm.
